userMessage: comand to set SV of CH1 to mag vs time

response.text:
Use:

`SV:CH1:SELect:RF_MAGnitude ON`

That is the **exact SCPI command** to display **CH1 Magnitude vs. Time** in Spectrum View / RF vs Time on this scope family. The uploaded Tek SCPI database shows `SV:CH<x>:SELect:RF_MAGnitude {ON|OFF}` for enabling that trace 

If you want to verify it, query:

`SV:CH1:SELect:RF_MAGnitude?`

And if you meant the **magnitude format** rather than just turning the trace on, use:

`SV:CH1:RF_MAGnitude:FORMat {AMPLINear|POWLINear|POWLOG}` 

If you want, I can also give you the matching command to set **Frequency vs Time** or **Phase vs Time**.
